Rynn passed the remains of the town of Rimeport, the few surviving buildings long abandoned in the face of the encroaching darkness.
Its walls were adorned with the heads of slain Stonecreep, and its towers bore the standard image of the Stoneborn, a hammer raised high above the head.
The guards at the gate, clad in the standard battle dress of the Stoneborn, were not quick to let her pass through.
They scrutinized the credentials of the courier from the Southhold with suspicious eyes.
Rynn knew that they would be checking her gear for the magical items that the people of the Southhold usually carried as both weapons and symbols of status.
The guards seemed uncomfortable with the very presence of a member of the Southhold, though Rynn could not figure out why.
